title: Death Coordinates
description: This mod sends an automatic message to players (on death) with the coordinates and world where they died.
body:
This mod sends an automatic message to players (on death) with the coordinates and world where they died:

![Death screen with coordinates and world](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e136fc2158ea1215dd330fc7e0c7b9220e528aa_0.webp)

It works server side and will do nothing if installed on client.
